description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gray exterior and a prominent hip roof in a light gray color. The front features a covered porch supported by columns, a balcony above the entryway, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. Multiple rectangular windows with white trim and grilles are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing a balanced appearance. The house sits on a green lawn with a paved driveway and a blue pickup truck parked outside the garage. The rear of the house includes a large deck area, partially covered and supported by columns, offering outdoor living space. The overall design is modern with traditional elements, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story dark gray house with a hip roof, attached garage, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway and balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, balcony above, attached garage to the right, and a blue pickup truck on the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and large deck area with railing, as well as the blue pickup truck parked outside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with a covered patio area supported by columns and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, covered patio, and the driveway extending to the rear, with the blue pickup truck visible in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, covered porch supported by columns, balcony above, and paved steps leading to the entrance.
